title: Can the U.S.-Iran Cease-Fire Survive Days of Strikes?
summary_full: Analysts saw little prospect of either President Trump or Tehran backing down after days of exchanging fire.
summary_public: Analysts saw little prospect of either President Trump or Tehran backing down after days of exchanging fire.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Can the U.S.-Iran Cease-Fire Survive Days of Strikes?
